badges.title: Badges
badges.hint: Keep running and racing to unlock more — walks count too.

history.title: History
history.pendingSync: Saved on this device — will sync to the cloud when possible.

stats.title: Stats
stats.empty: Record some runs to see your stats!

predictions.title: Race predictions
predictions.subtitle: Projected from your strongest run in the selected window
predictions.needRun: Log a run of 3 km or more to estimate your race times.
predictions.bestEffortExplainer: <0>Best-effort</0> projects your strongest run {{run}} to each distance with Riegel's formula.
predictions.hrExplainer: <0>HR-modelled</0> fits your pace against heart rate across {{n}} runs and extrapolates to threshold effort (~{{thr}} bpm) — so easy runs handled well count too, not just your fastest day.
predictions.hrLocked: Add your max HR in Settings and log more runs across easy + hard efforts to unlock the HR-based estimate.
predictions.gradeNoteClimb: Runs are grade-adjusted for elevation gain. Times are for a flat course; the race-day row includes its {{m}} m climb.
predictions.gradeNoteFlat: Runs are grade-adjusted for elevation gain. Times are for a flat course, except the race-day row once you set its climb in the Plan settings.

zones.title: Heart Rate Zones

descs.2: Easy runs, fat burning, building endurance base
descs.3: Moderate effort — marathon and long-run pace
descs.4: Comfortably hard — lactate threshold, tempo runs
descs.5: Maximum effort — short intervals, race pace

zones.karvonenBody: Zone HR = ((MaxHR - RestHR) x intensity%) + RestHR. HRR = {{max}} - {{rest}} = {{hrr}} bpm. Accounts for your resting HR and fitness, so it's more accurate than plain % of Max HR.
